Event: Hidden Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 11/08/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: RI13
Gold Guardian Ring

Once in a while, the unit's attacks deal extra physical damage equal to 10% of the target's max health for 5 sec. The attack has a 30% chance to deal pure damage equal to 15% of the target's max health instead of physical damage.

Requirements: 98-100
